channel.title: Comments on: Saint Arnold’s Divine Reserve 10, Ep. 138
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Bobby
item.dc:creator: Bobby
item.description: Scooter kind of looks like Ben Affleck. I just brewed my first American Barley Wine from extract. I'm really starting to get into this style. Keep up the great work guys!
item.content:encoded: Scooter kind of looks like Ben Affleck. I just brewed my first American Barley Wine from extract. I’m really starting to get into this style. Keep up the great work guys!
